3022390.name: Roguebound
3022390.description:
Roguebound is an action rogue-like dungeon crawler designed for two players. Learn to cooperate and complement each other while slashing and shooting your way through rooms of enemies utilizing bio-chemical mutations to grow stronger.

Battle interesting bosses and make your way down the caves to uncover the secrets of the depths.

Co-op

Play the game locally or through Steam Remote Play Together. Compete for most kills and damage or strategize and find the best approach to taking down your enemies together.

Beware, if your friend is downed in combat the mutations take over and you will have to beat some sense back into your partner.

Mutations

Mutate and build your character throughout each run, try out different combinations, figure out what you like and adapt to your surroundings. Unlock new mutations to discover in your next attempt.

Story

The Kingdom is at war, but a closer threat has emerged. Mysterious, aggressive creatures have begun sprawling out of an old mine. As the Kingdoms resources are limited, the Ruler decided to send in prisoners to solve the issue.

"Deal with the cave, and you will be rewarded with freedom".

Features

  • Challenging, reactive and tactical combat

  • Mutate and build your kit during the run

  • Local Co-op built to be played through Steam Remote Play Together

  • Maneuver the physically simulated chain to your advantage

  • Plenty of unlockable upgrades and abilities

  • Procedurally generated floors

  • Full gamepad support using Steam Input
